message:
feat(widgets): Add Virtualized<T> container for progressive rendering

Implement virtualization primitives for efficient rendering of large content (bd-3t87):

- Virtualized<T>: Generic container with visible range calculation
- VirtualizedStorage: Owned vs External storage abstraction
- ItemHeight: Fixed vs Variable height with HeightCache
- Momentum scrolling with fling/tick
- Overscan support for smooth scrolling
- Follow mode for streaming content

Features:
- O(visible) render time instead of O(total)
- Bounded memory with configurable capacity
- 13 unit tests covering scroll, visibility, momentum

Also fixes ftui-harness Cargo.toml: make ftui-runtime optional for pty-capture feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
